title: ficus trichocarpa var. obtusa
intro: Ficus trichocarpa var. obtusa, also known as the "hairy banyan", is a variety of the ficus tree that is characterized by its distinctive hairy leaves and stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ficus trichocarpa var. obtusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Ficus trichocarpa var. obtusa is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves and stems used in herbal preparations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
